Class ComparativeOperator

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.expression.Operator
recoder.java.expression.operator.ComparativeOperator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Expression, ExpressionContainer, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, ModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Equals, GreaterOrEquals, GreaterThan, LessOrEquals, LessThan, NotEquals
public abstract class ComparativeOperator extends Operator
Comparative operator.
